description_long: This object is a stylized male doll bust featuring a prominent, angular jawline and a full beard. The hair is sculpted in a voluminous, swept-back style with detailed texturing, and the face is marked by deep-set eyes and a stern, neutral expression. The upper torso is broad and muscular, with visible chest and shoulder definition, and the surface is finished in a uniform, metallic gray color. The back of the head and shoulders display a textured pattern resembling fabric or scales, adding visual interest to the otherwise smooth surfaces. The doll appears to be made from a hard, molded plastic material, typical of collectible or decorative figures. There are no visible joints, movable limbs, or accessories attached to the figure.
description: A stylized male doll bust with a full beard, swept-back hair, and a muscular torso, finished in metallic gray with detailed surface textures.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's stern face, full beard, and defined chest muscles.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the sculpted hair volume and profile of the nose and beard.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the textured pattern on the back of the head and shoulders, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the hair's texture and the profile of the face and beard.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll is depicted with a textured upper garment resembling a high-collared shirt or armor, featuring a grid-like pattern across the shoulders and chest in a monochromatic gray tone.
attribute_pose: The doll is in a static, upright pose with the head facing forward, shoulders squared, and no visible arms or lower body. The torso is rigid and symmetrical.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral with a closed mouth, straight eyebrows, and deep-set, expressionless eyes.
attribute_hair_style: Short, thick hair styled in a swept-back manner with a voluminous top and detailed texture, colored in dark gray to black.
